description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ruby:2.3 Docker image and a postgres:10 service, with POSTGRES_DB, POSTGRES_USER and POSTGRES_PASSWORD variables. Define stages test and build. In the test stage add an rspec job that runs apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq nodejs libpq-dev cmake, ruby -v, which ruby, gem install bundler --no-ri --no-rdoc, RAILS_ENV=test bundle install --jobs $(nproc) "${FLAGS[@]}", copies config/application.sample.yml to config/application.yml, config/database.sample.yml to config/database.yml, config/secrets.sample.yml to config/secrets.yml, then RAILS_ENV=test bundle exec rake db:setup and finally RAILS_ENV=test bundle exec rspec spec. Also add a rubocop job in the test stage that runs ruby -v, which ruby, gem install rubocop and rubocop. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are defined.
